name: Nut Bolt Puzzle Game
description: Become a pro at unscrewing nuts and bolts while enjoying the exciting journey ahead. Embark on an exhilarating adventure where bolts, nuts, and wooden puzzles intertwine to create a mind-boggling challenge. Plunge into a world teeming with enigmas, where each move uncovers a new twist in the game. Wood Screw, Nuts & Bolts Puzzle game, a place where the intrigue of screw puzzles and the excitement of fastening elements merge! Test your puzzle-solving abilities and advance to expert levels as you navigate through this attractive adventure.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
